scope: add --target-path to fix-plan for agent-scoped repair task filtering
add explicit in_scope_accept hints in diff next_actions to unblock agents from pre-existing noise
add baseline-workflow recommendation in scan next_actions for high-finding legacy repos
improve agent decision guidance in _diff_next_actions and _scan_next_actions
notes: Agent-workflow analysis from real-world Coding Agent testing revealed three critical UX gaps: (1) agents could not scope fix-plan to specific subdirectories, causing information overload on large repos, (2) diff output exposed in_scope_accept field but agents didn't discover it without explicit guidance in next-actions, (3) scan on legacy codebases with >20 findings resulted in permanent accept_change=false loop until agents discovered baseline workflow.

All three improvements are backward-compatible: fix-plan --target-path is optional (defaults to full repo), diff next_actions are purely additive guidance, scan recommendations only appear when findings >20.
Empirical validation: 5 new unit tests verify each gate condition, and full test suite remains green at 1065 tests (net +6 tests).
